mapper.sql: r.id, r.user_id, r.target_type, r.target_id, r.order_id, r.rating, r.content, r.images, r.is_anonymous, r.status, r.admin_reply, r.like_count, r.create_time, r.update_time, COALESCE(u.nickname, u.username, CONCAT('用户', r.user_id)) as user_nickname, COALESCE(u.avatar, 'https://picsum.photos/seed/user/100/100') as user_avatar, u.username as user_username, CASE WHEN r.target_type = 'CAT' THEN c.name WHEN r.target_type = 'PRODUCT' THEN p.name ELSE '未知对象' END as target_name, o.order_number
